subject: Reframe scenarios as user workflow journey
body:
Replace discrete scenarios with workflow-based analysis:
- START: User needs software
- EXPLORE: What are my options?
- COMPARE: Show side-by-side
- ITERATE: Change assumptions, see again
- SCENARIOS: What if X happens?

Key insight: Two perspectives throughout (independent vs related parties)

Updated prioritized gaps and recommended improvements.
title: Reframe scenarios as user workflow journey
